name: Dynamic Island
description:
A Dynamic Island for GNOME Shell. Floating media player with animated album art, playback controls, seek bar, and volume/brightness OSD — inspired by Dynamic Island.

Features:
* Floating pill at top-center of screen
* MPRIS media player integration (Spotify, Firefox, VLC, Rhythmbox, etc.)
* Compact view with waveform animation when playing
* Expanded view with album art, seek bar and controls on hover
* Volume and brightness OSD replaces default system popup
* Quick Settings tile to toggle the island on/off
* Smart auto-hide with configurable idle timeout
* Last.fm and ListenBrainz scrobbling support
* Weather display via wttr.in (no API key required)
* Bluetooth device indicator with battery level
* Smooth Expo animations throughout
* Configurable via preferences

Privacy notice:
* Weather data is fetched from wttr.in.
* When location is left empty, your IP is sent to ipapi.co to determine your city. Set a manual location in preferences to avoid this.
* Scrobbling sends track metadata to Last.fm and/or ListenBrainz when configured.
